{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01P9bQxz62B6NPtWSRkqbwyL","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /workspace/regression_test.py has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"680b67f6-75e6-4bb0-9f67-18cb01ead091","uuid":"fd4d7c2e-1115-4da3-97b0-ff5dd5f192d4","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/workspace/regression_test.py","oldString":"\"\"\"\nRegression test for Qt 6.4 dark mode text brightness threshold setting.\n\nIssue: When users configure colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text in Qt 6.4,\nthe setting has no effect on dark mode rendering.\n\nRoot cause: In Qt 6.4, Chromium renamed the TextBrightnessThreshold setting to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold. If qutebrowser sends the old name, Chromium will\nignore it, causing the setting to have no effect.\n\nThis test verifies that the threshold.text setting is correctly mapped to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold for Qt 6.4 (not TextBrightnessThreshold).\n\nSee: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3344100\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nimport tempfile\nfrom pathlib import Path\nimport unittest.mock\n\nfrom qutebrowser.config import config, configdata\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import usertypes, version\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\nfrom qutebrowser.misc import objects\n\n\ndef setup_test_environment():\n    \"\"\"Initialize the config and other requirements for testing.\"\"\"\n    # Initialize config data\n    configdata.init()\n\n    # Create a temporary config directory\n    tmpdir = Path(tempfile.gettempdir()) / 'qutebrowser_test'\n    tmpdir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)\n\n    # Initialize the config\n    config.init()\n\n    # Patch the backend to QtWebEngine\n    objects.backend = usertypes.Backend.QtWebEngine\n\n\ndef test_qt64_uses_foreground_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 6.4 uses ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold.\n\n    This test will FAIL if the threshold.text setting is not correctly mapped,\n    which would cause the setting to have no effect in Qt 6.4.\n    \"\"\"\n    setup_test_environment()\n\n    # Enable dark mode\n    config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n\n    # Set a custom threshold.text value (non-default)\n    config.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text', 100)\n\n    # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.4\n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n    settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n    # Extract the dark-mode-settings (where the threshold is stored for Qt 6.3+)\n    dark_mode_settings_list = settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n    dark_mode_settings = dict(dark_mode_settings_list)\n\n    # Qt 6.4 should use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold (not TextBrightnessThreshold)\n    assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n        f\"FAIL: 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not found in Qt 6.4 settings. \"\n        f\"Full settings: {dark_mode_settings_list}. \"\n        f\"This means the threshold.text setting will be ignored by Chromium in Qt 6.4.\"\n    )\n\n    # Verify the value is correct\n    assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100', (\n        f\"Expected '100', got '{dark_mode_settings.get('ForegroundBrightnessThreshold')}'\"\n    )\n\n    # Ensure the old TextBrightnessThreshold is NOT present\n    assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings, (\n        f\"BUG: Qt 6.4 should not use 'TextBrightnessThreshold', but it was found. \"\n        f\"This is the Qt 6.3 key name. Chromium won't recognize it in Qt 6.4.\"\n    )\n\n\ndef test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 6.3 still uses TextBrightnessThreshold (for comparison).\n\n    This test ensures that the Qt 6.4 change doesn't affect earlier Qt versions.\n    \"\"\"\n    setup_test_environment()\n\n    # Enable dark mode\n    config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n\n    # Set the same threshold value for comparison\n    config.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text', 100)\n\n    # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.3\n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n    settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n    # Extract the dark-mode-settings\n    dark_mode_settings_list = settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n    dark_mode_settings = dict(dark_mode_settings_list)\n\n    # Qt 6.3 should still use TextBrightnessThreshold\n    assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n        f\"Expected 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.3 settings, but got: {dark_mode_settings_list}\"\n    )\n\n    # Verify the value is correct\n    assert dark_mode_settings['TextBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n\n    # Qt 6.3 should NOT have the new name\n    assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings\n\n\ndef test_qt64_threshold_values_range():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the threshold.text setting works with various values for Qt 6.4.\n\n    This ensures the mapping works correctly across the valid range (0-256).\n    \"\"\"\n    setup_test_environment()\n\n    # Enable dark mode\n    config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n\n    # Test with different threshold values\n    test_values = [0, 50, 100, 150, 200, 256]\n\n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n\n    for test_value in test_values:\n        config.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text', test_value)\n\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(settings.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n\n        # Verify the correct key and value\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"Missing ForegroundBrightnessThreshold for value {test_value}\"\n        )\n        assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == str(test_value), (\n            f\"Expected '{test_value}', got '{dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold']}'\"\n        )\n\n        # Ensure old key is not present\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"TextBrightnessThreshold should not be present (bug) for value {test_value}\"\n        )\n\n\ndef test_threshold_background_not_affected():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the background threshold setting is handled correctly for Qt 6.4.\n\n    Note: Only the text threshold was renamed. Background threshold remains\n    BackgroundBrightnessThreshold, but we should verify this for consistency.\n    \"\"\"\n    setup_test_environment()\n\n    # Enable dark mode\n    config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n\n    # Set both thresholds\n    config.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text', 150)\n    config.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background', 100)\n\n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n    settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n    dark_mode_settings = dict(settings.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n\n    # Text threshold should use the new name in Qt 6.4\n    assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings\n    assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '150'\n\n    # Background threshold should remain unchanged\n    assert 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings\n    assert dark_mode_settings['BackgroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n\n    # Verify old text key is not present\n    assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings","newString":"\"\"\"\nRegression test for Qt 6.4 dark mode text brightness threshold setting.\n\nIssue: When users configure colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text in Qt 6.4,\nthe setting has no effect on dark mode rendering.\n\nRoot cause: In Qt 6.4, Chromium renamed the TextBrightnessThreshold setting to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold. If qutebrowser sends the old name, Chromium will\nignore it, causing the setting to have no effect.\n\nThis test verifies that the threshold.text setting is correctly mapped to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold for Qt 6.4 (not TextBrightnessThreshold).\n\nSee: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3344100\n\"\"\"\n\nimport unittest.mock\nfrom unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch\n\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import usertypes, version\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\nfrom qutebrowser.misc import objects\n\n\ndef create_mock_config():\n    \"\"\"Create a mock config object.\"\"\"\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.get.return_value = usertypes.UNSET\n    return mock_config\n\n\ndef test_qt64_uses_foreground_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 6.4 uses ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold.\n\n    This test will FAIL if the threshold.text setting is not correctly mapped,\n    which would cause the setting to have no effect in Qt 6.4.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Create a mock config with dark mode enabled and threshold.text set to 100\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n        if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n            return True\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n            return 100\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n            return usertypes.UNSET\n        else:\n            return fallback if fallback is not False else usertypes.UNSET\n\n    mock_config.instance.get = mock_get\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n\n    # Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):\n        # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.4\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings (where the threshold is stored for Qt 6.3+)\n        dark_mode_settings_list = settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(dark_mode_settings_list)\n\n        # Qt 6.4 should use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold (not TextBrightnessThreshold)\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"FAIL: 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not found in Qt 6.4 settings. \"\n            f\"Full settings: {dark_mode_settings_list}. \"\n            f\"This means the threshold.text setting will be ignored by Chromium in Qt 6.4.\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100', (\n            f\"Expected '100', got '{dark_mode_settings.get('ForegroundBrightnessThreshold')}'\"\n        )\n\n        # Ensure the old TextBrightnessThreshold is NOT present\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"BUG: Qt 6.4 should not use 'TextBrightnessThreshold', but it was found. \"\n            f\"This is the Qt 6.3 key name. Chromium won't recognize it in Qt 6.4.\"\n        )\n\n\ndef test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 6.3 still uses TextBrightnessThreshold (for comparison).\n\n    This test ensures that the Qt 6.4 change doesn't affect earlier Qt versions.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):\n        # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.3\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings\n        dark_mode_settings_list = settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(dark_mode_settings_list)\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should still use TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"Expected 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.3 settings, but got: {dark_mode_settings_list}\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert dark_mode_settings['TextBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should NOT have the new name\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings\n\n\ndef test_qt64_threshold_values_range():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the threshold.text setting works with various values for Qt 6.4.\n\n    This ensures the mapping works correctly across the valid range (0-256).\n    \"\"\"\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    def make_mock_get(threshold_value):\n        def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n            if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n                return True\n            elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n                return threshold_value\n            elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n                return usertypes.UNSET\n            else:\n                return fallback if fallback is not False else usertypes.UNSET\n        return mock_get\n\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n\n    # Ensure old key is not present\n            assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings, (\n                f\"TextBrightnessThreshold should not be present (bug) for value {test_value}\"\n            )\n\n\ndef test_threshold_background_not_affected():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the background threshold setting is handled correctly for Qt 6.4.\n\n    Note: Only the text threshold was renamed. {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012EdHYHduAnF1M9Rw8hn9qN","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /workspace/regression_test.py has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"680b67f6-75e6-4bb0-9f67-18cb01ead091","uuid":"52675816-5089-4706-8c29-d91d86320dde","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/workspace/regression_test.py","oldString":"import unittest.mock\nfrom unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch\n\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import usertypes, version\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\nfrom qutebrowser.misc import objects","newString":"import unittest.mock\nfrom unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch\n\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import version\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode","originalFile":"\"\"\"\nRegression test for Qt 6.4 dark mode text brightness threshold setting.\n\nIssue: When users configure colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text in Qt 6.4,\nthe setting has no effect on dark mode rendering.\n\nRoot cause: In Qt 6.4, Chromium renamed the TextBrightnessThreshold setting to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold. If qutebrowser sends the old name, Chromium will\nignore it, causing the setting to have no effect.\n\nThis test verifies that the threshold.text setting is correctly mapped to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold for Qt 6.4 (not TextBrightnessThreshold).\n\nSee: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3344100\n\"\"\"\n\nimport unittest.mock\nfrom unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch\n\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import usertypes, version\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\nfrom qutebrowser.misc import objects\n\n\ndef create_mock_config():\n    \"\"\"Create a mock config object.\"\"\"\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.get.return_value = usertypes.UNSET\n    return mock_config\n\n\ndef test_qt64_uses_foreground_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 6.4 uses ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold.\n\n    This test will FAIL if the threshold.text setting is not correctly mapped,\n    which would cause the setting to have no effect in Qt 6.4.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Create a mock config with dark mode enabled and threshold.text set to 100\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n        if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n            return True\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n            return 100\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n            return usertypes.UNSET\n        else:\n            return fallback if fallback is not False else usertypes.UNSET\n\n    mock_config.instance.get = mock_get\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n\n    # Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):\n        # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.4\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings (where the threshold is stored for Qt 6.3+)\n        dark_mode_settings_list = settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(dark_mode_settings_list)\n\n        # Qt 6.4 should use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold (not TextBrightnessThreshold)\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"FAIL: 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not found in Qt 6.4 settings. \"\n            f\"Full settings: {dark_mode_settings_list}. \"\n            f\"This means the threshold.text setting will be ignored by Chromium in Qt 6.4.\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100', (\n            f\"Expected '100', got '{dark_mode_settings.get('ForegroundBrightnessThreshold')}'\"\n        )\n\n        # Ensure the old TextBrightnessThreshold is NOT present\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"BUG: Qt 6.4 should not use 'TextBrightnessThreshold', but it was found. \"\n            f\"This is the Qt 6.3 key name. Chromium won't recognize it in Qt 6.4.\"\n        )\n\n\ndef test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 6.3 still uses TextBrightnessThreshold (for comparison).\n\n    This test ensures that the Qt 6.4 change doesn't affect earlier Qt versions.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Create a mock config with dark mode enabled and threshold.text set to 100\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n        if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n            return True\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n            return 100\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n            return usertypes.UNSET\n        else:\n            return fallback if fallback is not False else usertypes.UNSET\n\n    mock_config.instance.get = mock_get\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n\n    # Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):\n        # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.3\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings\n        dark_mode_settings_list = settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(dark_mode_settings_list)\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should still use TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"Expected 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.3 settings, but got: {dark_mode_settings_list}\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert dark_mode_settings['TextBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should NOT have the new name\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings\n\n\ndef test_qt64_threshold_values_range():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the threshold.text setting works with various values for Qt 6.4.\n\n    This ensures the mapping works correctly across the valid range (0-256).\n    \"\"\"\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    def make_mock_get(threshold_value):\n        def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n            if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n                return True\n            elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n                return threshold_value\n            elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n                return usertypes.UNSET\n            else:\n                return fallback if fallback is not False else usertypes.UNSET\n        return mock_get\n\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n\n    # Test with different threshold values\n    test_values = [0, 50, 100, 150, 200, 256]\n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n\n    for test_value in test_values:\n        mock_config.instance.get = make_mock_get(test_value)\n\n        with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):\n            settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n            dark_mode_settings = dict(settings.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n\n            # Verify the correct key and value\n            assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n                f\"Missing ForegroundBrightnessThreshold for value {test_value}\"\n            )\n            assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == str(test_value), (\n                f\"Expected '{test_value}', got '{dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold']}'\"\n            )\n\n            # Ensure old key is not present\n            assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings, (\n                f\"TextBrightnessThreshold should not be present (bug) for value {test_value}\"\n            )\n\n\ndef test_threshold_background_not_affected():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the background threshold setting is handled correctly for Qt 6.4.\n\n    Note: Only the text threshold was renamed. Background threshold remains\n    BackgroundBrightnessThreshold, but we should verify this for consistency.\n    \"\"\"\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n        if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n            return True\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n            return 150\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background':\n            return 100\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n            return usertypes.UNSET\n        else:\n            return fallback if fallback is not False else usertypes.UNSET\n\n    mock_config.instance.get = mock_get\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n\n    # Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(settings.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n\n        # Text threshold should use the new name in Qt 6.4\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings\n        assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '150'\n\n        # Background threshold should remain unchanged\n        assert 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings\n        assert dark_mode_settings['BackgroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n\n        # Verify old text key is not present\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":17,"oldLines":9,"newStart":17,"newLines":8,"lines":[" import unittest.mock"," from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch"," ","-from qutebrowser.utils import usertypes, version","+from qutebrowser.utils import version"," from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode","-from qutebrowser.misc import objects"," "," "," def create_mock_config():"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"680b67f6-75e6-4bb0-9f67-18cb01ead091","uuid":"0330c72b-014c-4c04-b257-e4ac6dd6083d","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/workspace/regression_test.py","content":"\"\"\"\nRegression test for Qt 6.4 dark mode text brightness threshold setting.\n\nIssue: When users configure colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text in Qt 6.4,\nthe setting has no effect on dark mode rendering.\n\nRoot cause: In Qt 6.4, Chromium renamed the TextBrightnessThreshold setting to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold. If qutebrowser sends the old name, Chromium will\nignore it, causing the setting to have no effect.\n\nThis test verifies that the threshold.text setting is correctly mapped to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold for Qt 6.4 (not TextBrightnessThreshold).\n\nSee: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3344100\n\"\"\"\n\nimport unittest.mock\nfrom unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch\n\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import version\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n\ndef create_mock_config():\n    \"\"\"Create a mock config object.\"\"\"\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.get.return_value = usertypes.UNSET\n    return mock_config\n\n\ndef test_qt64_uses_foreground_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 6.4 uses ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold.\n\n    This test will FAIL if the threshold.text setting is not correctly mapped,\n    which would cause the setting to have no effect in Qt 6.4.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Create a mock config with dark mode enabled and threshold.text set to 100\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    # Create sentinel for UNSET value\n    _UNSET = object()\n\n    def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n        if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n            return True\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n            return 100\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n            return _UNSET\n        else:\n            return fallback if fallback is not False else _UNSET\n\n    mock_config.instance.get = mock_get\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = _UNSET\n\n    # Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):\n        # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.4\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings (where the threshold is stored for Qt 6.3+)\n        dark_mode_settings_list = settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(dark_mode_settings_list)\n\n        # Qt 6.4 should use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold (not TextBrightnessThreshold)\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"FAIL: 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not found in Qt 6.4 settings. \"\n            f\"Full settings: {dark_mode_settings_list}. \"\n            f\"This means the threshold.text setting will be ignored by Chromium in Qt 6.4.\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100', (\n            f\"Expected '100', got '{dark_mode_settings.get('ForegroundBrightnessThreshold')}'\"\n        )\n\n        # Ensure the old TextBrightnessThreshold is NOT present\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"BUG: Qt 6.4 should not use 'TextBrightnessThreshold', but it was found. \"\n            f\"This is the Qt 6.3 key name. Chromium won't recognize it in Qt 6.4.\"\n        )\n\n\ndef test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 6.3 still uses TextBrightnessThreshold (for comparison).\n\n    This test ensures that the Qt 6.4 change doesn't affect earlier Qt versions.\n    \"\"\"\n    # If qutebrowser sends the old name, Chromium will\nignore it, causing the setting to have no effect.\n\nThis test verifies that the threshold.text setting is correctly mapped to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold for Qt 6.4 (not TextBrightnessThreshold).\n\nSee: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3344100\n\"\"\"\n\nimport unittest.mock\nfrom unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch\n\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import version\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n\ndef create_mock_config():\n    \"\"\"Create a mock config object.\"\"\"\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.get.return_value = usertypes.UNSET\n    return mock_config\n\n\ndef test_qt64_uses_foreground_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 6.4 uses ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold.\n\n    This test will FAIL if the threshold.text setting is not correctly mapped,\n    which would cause the setting to have no effect in Qt 6.4.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Create a mock config with dark mode enabled and threshold.text set to 100\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    # Create sentinel for UNSET value\n    _UNSET = object()\n\n    def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n        if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n            return True\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n            return 100\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n            return _UNSET\n        else:\n            return fallback if fallback is not False else _UNSET\n\n    mock_config.instance.get = mock_get\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = _UNSET\n\n    # Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):\n        # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.4\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings (where the threshold is stored for Qt 6.3+)\n        dark_mode_settings_list = settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(dark_mode_settings_list)\n\n        # Qt 6.4 should use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold (not TextBrightnessThreshold)\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"FAIL: 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not found in Qt 6.4 settings. \"\n            f\"Full settings: {dark_mode_settings_list}. \"\n            f\"This means the threshold.text setting will be ignored by Chromium in Qt 6.4.\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100', (\n            f\"Expected '100', got '{dark_mode_settings.get('ForegroundBrightnessThreshold')}'\"\n        )\n\n        # Ensure the old TextBrightnessThreshold is NOT present\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"BUG: Qt 6.4 should not use 'TextBrightnessThreshold', but it was found. \"\n            f\"This is the Qt 6.3 key name. Chromium won't recognize it in Qt 6.4.\"\n        )\n\n\ndef test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 6.3 still uses TextBrightnessThreshold (for comparison).\n\n    This test ensures that the Qt 6.4 change doesn't affect earlier Qt versions.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Create a mock config with dark mode enabled and threshold.text set to 100\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    # Create sentinel for UNSET value\n    _UNSET = object()\n\n    def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n        if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n            return True\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n            return 100\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n            return _UNSET\n        else:\n            return fallback if fallback is not False else _UNSET\n\n    mock_config.instance.get = mock_get\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = _UNSET\n\n    # Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):\n        # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.3\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings\n        dark_mode_settings_list = settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(dark_mode_settings_list)\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should still use TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"Expected 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.3 settings, but got: {dark_mode_settings_list}\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert dark_mode_settings['TextBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should NOT have the new name\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings\n\n\ndef test_qt64_threshold_values_range():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the threshold.text setting works with various values for Qt 6.4.\n\n    This ensures the mapping works correctly across the valid range (0-256).\n    \"\"\"\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    def make_mock_get(threshold_value):\n        def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n            if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n                return True\n            elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n                return threshold_value\n            elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n                return usertypes.UNSET\n            else:\n                return fallback if fallback is not False else usertypes.UNSET\n        return mock_get\n\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n\n    # Ensure old key is not present\n            assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings, (\n                f\"TextBrightnessThreshold should not be present (bug) for value {test_value}\"\n            )\n\n\ndef test_threshold_background_not_affected():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the background threshold setting is handled correctly for Qt 6.4.\n\n    Note: Only the text threshold was renamed. Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(settings.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n\n        # Text threshold should use the new name in Qt 6.4\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings\n        assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '150'\n\n        # Background threshold should remain unchanged\n        assert 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings\n        assert dark_mode_settings['BackgroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n\n        # {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01JqBgsoo2Ex4dVsj74s6ppt","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /workspace/regression_test.py has been updated. All occurrences of '    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):' were successfully replaced with '    with patch('qutebrowser.config.config', mock_config):'."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"680b67f6-75e6-4bb0-9f67-18cb01ead091","uuid":"e5265389-40c3-41ab-80a2-1290be719a0c","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/workspace/regression_test.py","oldString":"    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):","newString":"    with patch('qutebrowser.config.config', mock_config):","originalFile":"\"\"\"\nRegression test for Qt 6.4 dark mode text brightness threshold setting.\n\nIssue: When users configure colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text in Qt 6.4,\nthe setting has no effect on dark mode rendering.\n\nRoot cause: In Qt 6.4, Chromium renamed the TextBrightnessThreshold setting to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold. If qutebrowser sends the old name, Chromium will\nignore it, causing the setting to have no effect.\n\nThis test verifies that the threshold.text setting is correctly mapped to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold for Qt 6.4 (not TextBrightnessThreshold).\n\nSee: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3344100\n\"\"\"\n\nimport unittest.mock\nfrom unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch\n\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import version\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n\n\n\ndef test_qt64_uses_foreground_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 6.4 uses ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold.\n\n    This test will FAIL if the threshold.text setting is not correctly mapped,\n    which would cause the setting to have no effect in Qt 6.4.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Create a mock config with dark mode enabled and threshold.text set to 100\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    # Create sentinel for UNSET value\n    _UNSET = object()\n\n    def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n        if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n            return True\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n            return 100\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n            return _UNSET\n        else:\n            return fallback if fallback is not False else _UNSET\n\n    mock_config.instance.get = mock_get\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = _UNSET\n\n    # Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):\n        # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.4\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings (where the threshold is stored for Qt 6.3+)\n        dark_mode_settings_list = settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(dark_mode_settings_list)\n\n        # Qt 6.4 should use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold (not TextBrightnessThreshold)\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"FAIL: 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not found in Qt 6.4 settings. \"\n            f\"Full settings: {dark_mode_settings_list}. \"\n            f\"This means the threshold.text setting will be ignored by Chromium in Qt 6.4.\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100', (\n            f\"Expected '100', got '{dark_mode_settings.get('ForegroundBrightnessThreshold')}'\"\n        )\n\n        # Ensure the old TextBrightnessThreshold is NOT present\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"BUG: Qt 6.4 should not use 'TextBrightnessThreshold', but it was found. \"\n            f\"This is the Qt 6.3 key name. Chromium won't recognize it in Qt 6.4.\"\n        )\n\n\ndef test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 6.3 still uses TextBrightnessThreshold (for comparison).\n\n    This test ensures that the Qt 6.4 change doesn't affect earlier Qt versions.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Create a mock config with dark mode enabled and threshold.text set to 100\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    # Create sentinel for UNSET value\n    _UNSET = object()\n\n    def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n        if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n            return True\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n            return 100\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n            return _UNSET\n        else:\n            return fallback if fallback is not False else _UNSET\n\n    mock_config.instance.get = mock_get\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = _UNSET\n\n    # Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):\n        # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.3\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings\n        dark_mode_settings_list = settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(dark_mode_settings_list)\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should still use TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"Expected 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.3 settings, but got: {dark_mode_settings_list}\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert dark_mode_settings['TextBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should NOT have the new name\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings\n\n\ndef test_qt64_threshold_values_range():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the threshold.text setting works with various values for Qt 6.4.\n\n    This ensures the mapping works correctly across the valid range (0-256).\n    \"\"\"\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    # Create sentinel for UNSET value\n    _UNSET = object()\n\n    def make_mock_get(threshold_value):\n        def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n            if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n                return True\n            elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n                return threshold_value\n            elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n                return _UNSET\n            else:\n                return fallback if fallback is not False else _UNSET\n        return mock_get\n\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = _UNSET\n\n    # Test with different threshold values\n    test_values = [0, 50, 100, 150, 200, 256]\n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n\n    for test_value in test_values:\n        mock_config.instance.get = make_mock_get(test_value)\n\n        with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):\n            settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n            dark_mode_settings = dict(settings.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n\n            # Verify the correct key and value\n            assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n                f\"Missing ForegroundBrightnessThreshold for value {test_value}\"\n            )\n            assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == str(test_value), (\n                f\"Expected '{test_value}', got '{dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold']}'\"\n            )\n\n            # Ensure old key is not present\n            assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings, (\n                f\"TextBrightnessThreshold should not be present (bug) for value {test_value}\"\n            )\n\n\ndef test_threshold_background_not_affected():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the background threshold setting is handled correctly for Qt 6.4.\n\n    Note: Only the text threshold was renamed. Background threshold remains\n    BackgroundBrightnessThreshold, but we should verify this for consistency.\n    \"\"\"\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    # Create sentinel for UNSET value\n    _UNSET = object()\n\n    def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n        if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n            return True\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n            return 150\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background':\n            return 100\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n            return _UNSET\n        else:\n            return fallback if fallback is not False else _UNSET\n\n    mock_config.instance.get = mock_get\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = _UNSET\n\n    # Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(settings.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n\n        # Text threshold should use the new name in Qt 6.4\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings\n        assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '150'\n\n        # Background threshold should remain unchanged\n        assert 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings\n        assert dark_mode_settings['BackgroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n\n        # Verify old text key is not present\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":51,"oldLines":7,"newStart":51,"newLines":7,"lines":["     mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = _UNSET"," ","     # Patch the config module in darkmode","-    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):","+    with patch('qutebrowser.config.config', mock_config):","         # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.4","         versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')","         settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])"]},{"oldStart":106,"oldLines":7,"newStart":106,"newLines":7,"lines":["     mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = _UNSET"," ","     # Patch the config module in darkmode","-    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):","+    with patch('qutebrowser.config.config', mock_config):","         # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.3","         versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')","         settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])"]},{"oldStart":160,"oldLines":7,"newStart":160,"newLines":7,"lines":["     for test_value in test_values:","         mock_config.instance.get = make_mock_get(test_value)"," ","-        with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):","+        with patch('qutebrowser.config.config', mock_config):","             settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])","             dark_mode_settings = dict(settings.get('dark-mode-settings', []))"," "]},{"oldStart":207,"oldLines":7,"newStart":207,"newLines":7,"lines":["     mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = _UNSET"," ","     # Patch the config module in darkmode","-    with patch('qutebrowser.browser.webengine.darkmode.config', mock_config):","+    with patch('qutebrowser.config.config', mock_config):","         versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')","         settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])","         dark_mode_settings = dict(settings.get('dark-mode-settings', []))"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":true}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_015eqvGrWFS7NzZaeXqG5vwY","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01FDX7Gck6GmwpzMwAsQHQr3","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/workspace/regression_test.py","content":"\"\"\"\nRegression test for Qt 6.4 dark mode text brightness threshold setting.\n\nIssue: When users configure colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text in Qt 6.4,\nthe setting has no effect on dark mode rendering.\n\nRoot cause: In Qt 6.4, Chromium renamed the TextBrightnessThreshold setting to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold. If qutebrowser sends the old name, Chromium will\nignore it, causing the setting to have no effect.\n\nThis test verifies that the threshold.text setting is correctly mapped to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold for Qt 6.4 (not TextBrightnessThreshold).\n\nSee: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3344100\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n\ndef test_qt64_definition_uses_foreground_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the Qt 6.4 definition uses ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold.\n\n    This test inspects the darkmode module's internal definitions to ensure the\n    threshold.text setting is correctly mapped for Qt 6.4.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Get the Qt 6.4 definition\n    qt64_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n\n    # Check that the definition has the correct setting\n    found = False\n    for switch_name, setting in qt64_def.prefixed_settings():\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n            found = True\n            # The chromium_key should be ForegroundBrightnessThreshold for Qt 6.4\n            assert setting.chromium_key == 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', (\n                f\"BUG: Qt 6.4 should use 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', \"\n                f\"but found '{setting.chromium_key}'. This is the bug that causes \"\n                f\"the threshold.text setting to have no effect in Qt 6.4.\"\n            )\n            break\n\n    assert found, \"threshold.text setting not found in Qt 6.4 definition\"\n\n\ndef test_qt63_definition_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the Qt 6.3 definition still uses TextBrightnessThreshold.\n\n    This ensures the Qt 6.4 change doesn't affect earlier Qt versions.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Get the Qt 6.3 definition\n    qt63_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_63]\n\n    # Check that the definition has the correct setting\n    found = False\n    for switch_name, setting in qt63_def.prefixed_settings():\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n            found = True\n            # Qt 6.3 should still use TextBrightnessThreshold\n            assert setting.chromium_key == 'TextBrightnessThreshold', (\n                f\"Qt 6.3 should use 'TextBrightnessThreshold', \"\n                f\"but found '{setting.chromium_key}'\"\n            )\n            break\n\n    assert found, \"threshold.text setting not found in Qt 6.3 definition\"\n\n\ndef test_threshold_background_not_affected():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the background threshold setting is not affected by Qt 6.4 change.\n\n    Only the text threshold was renamed. Background threshold remains BackgroundBrightnessThreshold.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Get the Qt 6.4 definition\n    qt64_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n\n    # Find both threshold settings\n    text_setting = None\n    background_setting = None\n\n    for switch_name, setting in qt64_def.prefixed_settings():\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n            text_setting = setting\n        elif setting.option == 'threshold.background':\n            background_setting = setting\n\n    # Verify text threshold uses new name\n    assert text_setting is not None, \"threshold.text setting not found\"\n    assert text_setting.chromium_key == 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', (\n        f\"Qt 6.4 text threshold should be 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', \"\n        f\"but found '{text_setting.chromium_key}'\"\n    )\n\n    # Verify background threshold still uses old name\n    assert background_setting is not None, \"threshold.background setting not found\"\n    assert background_setting.chromium_key == 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold', (\n        f\"Qt 6.4 background threshold should be 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold', \"\n        f\"but found '{background_setting.chromium_key}'\"\n    )\n\n\ndef test_qt515_3_qt62_unaffected():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 5.15.3 and 6.2 definitions are not affected by the Qt 6.4 change.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Get definitions for earlier versions\n    qt515_3_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_515_3]\n\n    # Check Qt 5.15.3\n    for switch_name, setting in qt515_3_def.prefixed_settings():\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n            assert setting.chromium_key == 'TextBrightnessThreshold', (\n                f\"Qt 5.15.3 should use 'TextBrightnessThreshold', \"\n                f\"but found '{setting.chromium_key}'\"\n            )\n            break\n\n\ndef test_variant_detection():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the variant detection correctly identifies Qt 6.4.\n    \"\"\"\n    from qutebrowser.utils import version, utils\n\n    # Create a Qt 6.4 version object\n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions(\n        webengine=utils.VersionNumber(6, 4),\n        chromium='120.0.0.0',\n        source='test'\n    )\n\n    # Verify it detects Qt 6.4\n    detected_variant = darkmode._variant(versions)\n    assert detected_variant == darkmode.Variant.qt_64, (\n        f\"Expected Variant.qt_64, but got {detected_variant}\"\n    )\n\n    # Verify Qt 6.3 is detected as qt_63\n    versions_63 = version.WebEngineVersions(\n        webengine=utils.VersionNumber(6, 3),\n        chromium='120.0.0.0',\n        source='test'\n    )\n    detected_variant_63 = darkmode._variant(versions_63)\n    assert detected_variant_63 == darkmode.Variant.qt_63, (\n        f\"Expected Variant.qt_63, but got {detected_variant_63}\"\n    )\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":0,"cache_creation_input_tokens":659,"cache_read_input_tokens":98350,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":659},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"680b67f6-75e6-4bb0-9f67-18cb01ead091","uuid":"0c4f3c9e-e929-4435-8c46-892d6a5a73e2"}

Get definitions for earlier versions\n    qt515_3_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_515_3]\n\n    # Check Qt 5.15.3\n    for switch_name, setting in qt515_3_def.prefixed_settings():\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n            assert setting.chromium_key == 'TextBrightnessThreshold', (\n                f\"Qt 5.15.3 should use 'TextBrightnessThreshold', \"\n                f\"but found '{setting.chromium_key}'\"\n            )\n            break\n\n\ndef test_variant_detection():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the variant detection correctly identifies Qt 6.4.\n    \"\"\"\n    from qutebrowser.utils import version, utils\n\n    # Create a Qt 6.4 version object\n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions(\n        webengine=utils.VersionNumber(6, 4),\n        chromium='120.0.0.0',\n        source='test'\n    )\n\n    # Verify it detects Qt 6.4\n    detected_variant = darkmode._variant(versions)\n    assert detected_variant == darkmode.Variant.qt_64, (\n        f\"Expected Variant.qt_64, but got {detected_variant}\"\n    )\n\n    # Verify Qt 6.3 is detected as qt_63\n    versions_63 = version.WebEngineVersions(\n        webengine=utils.VersionNumber(6, 3),\n        chromium='120.0.0.0',\n        source='test'\n    )\n    detected_variant_63 = darkmode._variant(versions_63)\n    assert detected_variant_63 == darkmode.Variant.qt_63, (\n        f\"Expected Variant.qt_63, but got {detected_variant_63}\"\n    )\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":14,"oldLines":211,"newStart":14,"newLines":136,"lines":[" See: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3344100"," \"\"\""," ","-import unittest.mock","-from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch","-","-from qutebrowser.utils import version"," from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode"," "," ","-","-","-def test_qt64_uses_foreground_brightness_threshold():","+def test_qt64_definition_uses_foreground_brightness_threshold():","     \"\"\"","-    Verify that Qt 6.4 uses ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold.","+    Verify that the Qt 6.4 definition uses ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold."," ","-    This test will FAIL if the threshold.text setting is not correctly mapped,","-    which would cause the setting to have no effect in Qt 6.4.","+    This test inspects the darkmode module's internal definitions to ensure the","+    threshold.text setting is correctly mapped for Qt 6.4.","     \"\"\"","-    # Verify old text key is not present","-        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings","+    # Verify Qt 6.3 is detected as qt_63","+    versions_63 = version.WebEngineVersions(","+        webengine=utils.VersionNumber(6, 3),","+        chromium='120.0.0.0',","+        source='test'","+    )","+    detected_variant_63 = darkmode._variant(versions_63)","+    assert detected_variant_63 == darkmode.Variant.qt_63, (","+        f\"Expected Variant.qt_63, but got {detected_variant_63}\"","+    )"]}],"originalFile":"\"\"\"\nRegression test for Qt 6.4 dark mode text brightness threshold setting.\n\nIssue: When users configure colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text in Qt 6.4,\nthe setting has no effect on dark mode rendering.\n\nRoot cause: In Qt 6.4, Chromium renamed the TextBrightnessThreshold setting to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold. If qutebrowser sends the old name, Chromium will\nignore it, causing the setting to have no effect.\n\nThis test verifies that the threshold.text setting is correctly mapped to\nForegroundBrightnessThreshold for Qt 6.4 (not TextBrightnessThreshold).\n\nSee: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3344100\n\"\"\"\n\nimport unittest.mock\nfrom unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch\n\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import version\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n\n\n\ndef test_qt64_uses_foreground_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 6.4 uses ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold.\n\n    This test will FAIL if the threshold.text setting is not correctly mapped,\n    which would cause the setting to have no effect in Qt 6.4.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Create a mock config with dark mode enabled and threshold.text set to 100\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    # Create sentinel for UNSET value\n    _UNSET = object()\n\n    def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n        if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n            return True\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n            return 100\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n            return _UNSET\n        else:\n            return fallback if fallback is not False else _UNSET\n\n    mock_config.instance.get = mock_get\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = _UNSET\n\n    # Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.config.config', mock_config):\n        # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.4\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings (where the threshold is stored for Qt 6.3+)\n        dark_mode_settings_list = settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(dark_mode_settings_list)\n\n        # Qt 6.4 should use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold (not TextBrightnessThreshold)\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"FAIL: 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not found in Qt 6.4 settings. \"\n            f\"Full settings: {dark_mode_settings_list}. \"\n            f\"This means the threshold.text setting will be ignored by Chromium in Qt 6.4.\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100', (\n            f\"Expected '100', got '{dark_mode_settings.get('ForegroundBrightnessThreshold')}'\"\n        )\n\n        # Ensure the old TextBrightnessThreshold is NOT present\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"BUG: Qt 6.4 should not use 'TextBrightnessThreshold', but it was found. \"\n            f\"This is the Qt 6.3 key name. Chromium won't recognize it in Qt 6.4.\"\n        )\n\n\ndef test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that Qt 6.3 still uses TextBrightnessThreshold (for comparison).\n\n    This test ensures that the Qt 6.4 change doesn't affect earlier Qt versions.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Create a mock config with dark mode enabled and threshold.text set to 100\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    # Create sentinel for UNSET value\n    _UNSET = object()\n\n    def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n        if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n            return True\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n            return 100\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n            return _UNSET\n        else:\n            return fallback if fallback is not False else _UNSET\n\n    mock_config.instance.get = mock_get\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = _UNSET\n\n    # Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.config.config', mock_config):\n        # Get the dark mode settings for Qt 6.3\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings\n        dark_mode_settings_list = settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(dark_mode_settings_list)\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should still use TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n            f\"Expected 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.3 settings, but got: {dark_mode_settings_list}\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert dark_mode_settings['TextBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should NOT have the new name\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings\n\n\ndef test_qt64_threshold_values_range():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the threshold.text setting works with various values for Qt 6.4.\n\n    This ensures the mapping works correctly across the valid range (0-256).\n    \"\"\"\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    # Create sentinel for UNSET value\n    _UNSET = object()\n\n    def make_mock_get(threshold_value):\n        def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n            if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n                return True\n            elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n                return threshold_value\n            elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n                return _UNSET\n            else:\n                return fallback if fallback is not False else _UNSET\n        return mock_get\n\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = _UNSET\n\n    # Test with different threshold values\n    test_values = [0, 50, 100, 150, 200, 256]\n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n\n    for test_value in test_values:\n        mock_config.instance.get = make_mock_get(test_value)\n\n        with patch('qutebrowser.config.config', mock_config):\n            settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n            dark_mode_settings = dict(settings.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n\n            # Verify the correct key and value\n            assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings, (\n                f\"Missing ForegroundBrightnessThreshold for value {test_value}\"\n            )\n            assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == str(test_value), (\n                f\"Expected '{test_value}', got '{dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold']}'\"\n            )\n\n            # Ensure old key is not present\n            assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings, (\n                f\"TextBrightnessThreshold should not be present (bug) for value {test_value}\"\n            )\n\n\ndef test_threshold_background_not_affected():\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that the background threshold setting is handled correctly for Qt 6.4.\n\n    Note: Only the text threshold was renamed. Background threshold remains\n    BackgroundBrightnessThreshold, but we should verify this for consistency.\n    \"\"\"\n    mock_config = MagicMock()\n\n    # Create sentinel for UNSET value\n    _UNSET = object()\n\n    def mock_get(key, fallback=False):\n        if key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled':\n            return True\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text':\n            return 150\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background':\n            return 100\n        elif key == 'colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme':\n            return _UNSET\n        else:\n            return fallback if fallback is not False else _UNSET\n\n    mock_config.instance.get = mock_get\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = _UNSET\n\n    # Patch the config module in darkmode\n    with patch('qutebrowser.config.config', mock_config):\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        dark_mode_settings = dict(settings.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n\n        # Text threshold should use the new name in Qt 6.4\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings\n        assert dark_mode_settings['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '150'\n\n        # Background threshold should remain unchanged\n        assert 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold' in dark_mode_settings\n        assert dark_mode_settings['BackgroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n\n        # Verify old text key is not present\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dark_mode_settings\n"}}

\\n343: def _variant(versions: version.WebEngineVersions) -> Variant:\\n344:     \\\"\\\"\\\"Get the dark mode variant based on the underlying Qt version.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n345:     env_var = os.environ.get('QUTE_DARKMODE_VARIANT')\\n346:     if env_var is not None:\\n347:         try:\\n348:             return Variant[env_var]\\n349:         except KeyError:\\n350:             log.init.warning(f\\\"Ignoring invalid QUTE_DARKMODE_VARIANT={env_var}\\\")\\n351: \\n352:     if versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(6, 4):\\n353:         return Variant.qt_64\\n354:     elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(6, 3):\\n355:         return Variant.qt_63\\n356:     elif (versions.webengine == utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 2) and\\n357:             versions.chromium_major == 87):\\n358:         # WORKAROUND for Gentoo packaging something newer as 5.15.2...\\n359:         return Variant.qt_515_3\\n360:     elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 3):\\n361:         return Variant.qt_515_3\\n362:     elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 2):\\n363:         return Variant.qt_515_2\\n364:     raise utils.Unreachable(versions.webengine)\\n365: \\n366: \\n367: def settings(\\n368:         *,\\n369:         versions: version.WebEngineVersions,\\n370:         special_flags: Sequence[str],\\n371: ) -> Mapping[str, Sequence[Tuple[str, str]]]:\\n372:     \\\"\\\"\\\"Get necessary blink settings to configure dark mode for QtWebEngine.\\n373: \\n374:     Args:\\n375:        Existing '--blink-settings=...' flags, if any.\\n376: \\n377:     Returns:\\n378:         A dict which maps Chromium switch names (blink-settings or dark-mode-settings)\\n379:         to a sequence of tuples, each tuple being a key/value pair to pass to that\\n380:         setting.\\n381:     \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n382:     variant = _variant(versions)\\n383:     log.init.debug(f\\\"Darkmode variant: {variant.name}\\\")\\n384: \\n385:     result: Mapping[str, List[Tuple[str, str]]] = collections.defaultdict(list)\\n386: \\n387:     blink_settings_flag = f'--{_BLINK_SETTINGS}='\\n388:     for flag in special_flags:\\n389:         if flag.startswith(blink_settings_flag):\\n390:             for pair in flag[len(blink_settings_flag):].split(','):\\n391:                 key, val = pair.split('=', maxsplit=1)\\n392:                 result[_BLINK_SETTINGS].append((key, val))\\n393: \\n394:     preferred_color_scheme_key = config.instance.get(\\n395:         \\\"colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme\\\", fallback=False)\\n396:     preferred_color_scheme_defs = _PREFERRED_COLOR_SCHEME_DEFINITIONS[variant]\\n397:     if preferred_color_scheme_key in preferred_color_scheme_defs:\\n398:         value = preferred_color_scheme_defs[preferred_color_scheme_key]\\n399:         result[_BLINK_SETTINGS].append((\\\"preferredColorScheme\\\", value))\\n400: \\n401:     if not config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled:\\n402:         return result\\n403: \\n404:     definition = _DEFINITIONS[variant]\\n405: \\n406:     for switch_name, setting in definition.prefixed_settings():\\n407:         # To avoid blowing up the commandline length, we only pass modified\\n408:         # settings to Chromium, as our defaults line up with Chromium's.\\n409:         # However, we always pass enabled/algorithm to make sure dark mode gets\\n410:         # actually turned on.\\n411:         value = config.instance.get(\\n412:             'colors.webpage.darkmode.' + setting.option,\\n413:             fallback=setting.option in definition.mandatory)\\n414:         if isinstance(value, usertypes.Unset):\\n415:             continue\\n416: \\n417:         result[switch_name].append(setting.chromium_tuple(value))\\n418: \\n419:     return result\\n420: new = copy.copy(self)\\n248:         new._settings = self._settings + (setting,)  # pylint: disable=protected-access\\n249:         return new\\n250: \\n251:     def copy_replace_setting(self, option: if setting.option == option:\\n260:                 setting.chromium_key = chromium_key\\n261:                 return new\\n262: \\n263:         raise ValueError(f\\\"Setting {option} not found in \\\"1\\\",\\n318:         \\\"light\\\": \\\"2\\\",\\n319:         # WORKAROUND for https://bugreports.qt.io/browse/QTBUG-89753\\n320:         # Fall back to \\\"light\\\" instead of \\\"no preference\\\" (which was removed from the\\n321:         # standard)\\n322:         \\\"auto\\\": \\\"2\\\",\\n323:         usertypes.UNSET: \\\"2\\\",\\n324:     },\\n325: \\n326: \\n343: def _variant(versions: version.WebEngineVersions) -> Variant:\\n344:     \\\"\\\"\\\"Get the dark mode variant based on the underlying Qt version.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n345:     env_var = os.environ.get('QUTE_DARKMODE_VARIANT')\\n346:     if env_var is not None:\\n347:         try:\\n348:             return Variant[env_var]\\n349:         except KeyError:\\n350:             log.init.warning(f\\\"Ignoring invalid QUTE_DARKMODE_VARIANT={env_var}\\\")\\n351: \\n352:     if versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(6, 4):\\n353:         return Variant.qt_64\\n354:     elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(6, 3):\\n355:         return Variant.qt_63\\n356:     elif (versions.webengine == utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 2) and\\n357:             versions.chromium_major == 87):\\n358:         # WORKAROUND for Gentoo packaging something newer as 5.15.2...\\n359:         return Variant.qt_515_3\\n360:     elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 3):\\n361:         return Variant.qt_515_3\\n362:     elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 2):\\n363:         return Variant.qt_515_2\\n364:     raise utils.Unreachable(versions.webengine)\\n365: \\n366: \\n367: def settings(\\n368:         *,\\n369:         versions: version.WebEngineVersions,\\n370:         special_flags: Sequence[str],\\n371: ) -> Mapping[str, Sequence[Tuple[str, str]]]:\\n372:     \\\"\\\"\\\"Get necessary blink settings to configure dark mode for QtWebEngine.\\n373: \\n374:     Args:\\n375:        Existing '--blink-settings=...' flags, if any.\\n376: \\n377:     Returns:\\n378:         A dict which maps Chromium switch names (blink-settings or dark-mode-settings)\\n379:         to a sequence of tuples, each tuple being a key/value pair to pass to that\\n380:         setting.\\n381:     \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n382:     variant = _variant(versions)\\n383:     log.init.debug(f\\\"Darkmode variant: {variant.name}\\\")\\n384: \\n385:     result: Mapping[str, List[Tuple[str, str]]] = collections.defaultdict(list)\\n386: \\n387:     blink_settings_flag = f'--{_BLINK_SETTINGS}='\\n388:     for flag in special_flags:\\n389:         if flag.startswith(blink_settings_flag):\\n390:             for pair in flag[len(blink_settings_flag):].split(','):\\n391:                 key, val = pair.split('=', maxsplit=1)\\n392:                 result[_BLINK_SETTINGS].append((key, val))\\n393: \\n394:     preferred_color_scheme_key = config.instance.get(\\n395:         \\\"colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme\\\", fallback=False)\\n396:     preferred_color_scheme_defs = _PREFERRED_COLOR_SCHEME_DEFINITIONS[variant]\\n397:     if preferred_color_scheme_key in preferred_color_scheme_defs:\\n398:         value = preferred_color_scheme_defs[preferred_color_scheme_key]\\n399:         result[_BLINK_SETTINGS].append((\\\"preferredColorScheme\\\", value))\\n400: \\n401:     if not config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled:\\n402:         return result\\n403: \\n404:     definition = _DEFINITIONS[variant]\\n405: \\n406:     for switch_name, setting in definition.prefixed_settings():\\n407:         # To avoid blowing up the commandline length, we only pass modified\\n408:         # settings to Chromium, as our defaults line up with Chromium's.\\n409:         # However, we always pass enabled/algorithm to make sure dark mode gets\\n410:         # actually turned on.\\n411:         value = config.instance.get(\\n412:             'colors.webpage.darkmode.' + setting.option,\\n413:             fallback=setting.option in definition.mandatory)\\n414:         if isinstance(value, usertypes.Unset):\\n415:             continue\\n416: \\n417:         result[switch_name].append(setting.chromium_tuple(value))\\n418: \\n419:     return result\\n420: # SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Florian Bruhin (The Compiler) <mail@qutebrowser.org>\n2: #\n3: # SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-or-later\n4: \n5: \"\"\"Get darkmode arguments to pass to Qt.\n6: \n7: Overview of blink setting names based on the Qt version:\n8: \n9: Qt 5.10 (UNSUPPORTED)\n10: ---------------------\n11: \n12: First implementation, called \"high contrast mode\".\n13: \n14: - highContrastMode (kOff/kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/kInvertLightness)\n15: - highContrastGrayscale (bool)\n16: - highContrastContrast (float)\n17: - highContractImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone)\n18: \n19: Qt 5.11, 5.12, 5.13 (UNSUPPORTED)\n20: ---------------------------------\n21: \n22: New \"smart\" image policy.\n23: \n24: - Mode/Grayscale/Contrast as above\n25: - highContractImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone/kFilterSmart [new!])\n26: \n27: Qt 5.14 (UNSUPPORTED)\n28: ---------------------\n29: \n30: Renamed to \"darkMode\".\n31: \n32: - darkMode (kOff/kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/kInvertLightness/\n33:             kInvertLightnessLAB [new!])\n34: - darkModeGrayscale (bool)\n35: - darkModeContrast (float)\n36: - darkModeImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone/kFilterSmart)\n37: - darkModePagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterByBackground) [new!]\n38: - darkModeTextBrightnessThreshold (int) [new!]\n39: - darkModeBackgroundBrightnessThreshold (int) [new!]\n40: - darkModeImageGrayscale (float) [new!]\n41: \n42: Qt 5.15.0 and 5.15.1 (UNSUPPORTED)\n43: ----------------------------------\n44: \n45: \"darkMode\" split into \"darkModeEnabled\" and \"darkModeInversionAlgorithm\".\n46: \n47: - darkModeEnabled (bool) [new!]\n48: - darkModeInversionAlgorithm (kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/\n49:                                 kInvertLightness/kInvertLightnessLAB)\n50: - Rest (except darkMode) as above.\n51: - NOTE: smart image policy is broken with Qt 5.15.0!\n52: \n53: Qt 5.15.2\n54: ---------\n55: \n56: Prefix changed to \"forceDarkMode\".\n57: \n58: - As with Qt 5.15.0 / .1, but with \"forceDarkMode\" as prefix.\n59: \n60: Qt 5.15.3\n61: ---------\n62: \n63: Settings split to new --dark-mode-settings switch:\n64: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2390588\n65: \n66: - Everything except forceDarkModeEnabled goes to the other switch.\n67: - Algorithm uses a different enum with kOff gone.\n68: - No \"forceDarkMode\" prefix anymore.\n69: \n70: Removed DarkModePagePolicy:\n71: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2323441\n72: \n73: \"prefers color scheme dark\" changed enum values:\n74: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2232922\n75: \n76: - Now needs to be 0 for dark and 1 for light\n77:   (before: 0 no preference / 1 dark / 2 light)\n78: \n79: Qt 6.2\n80: ------\n81: \n82: No significant changes over 5.15.3\n83: \n84: Qt 6.3\n85: ------\n86: \n87: - New IncreaseTextContrast:\n88: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2893236\n89: \n90: Qt 6.4\n91: ------\n92: \n93: - Renamed TextBrightnessThreshold to ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n94: \n95:   \"Correct brightness threshold of darkmode color classifier\"\n96:   https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3344100\n97: \n98:   \"Rename text_classifier to foreground_classifier\"\n99:   https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3226389\n100: \"\"\"\n101: \n102: import os\n103: import copy\n104: import enum\n105: import dataclasses\n106: import collections\n107: from
